View_Businesses.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_Businesses]
AS
SELECT        dbo.BusinessRelations.businessID, dbo.Businesses.name AS businessName, dbo.BusinessRelations.relationTypeID, dbo.RelationTypes.name AS relationshipName
FROM            dbo.RelationTypes INNER JOIN
                         dbo.BusinessRelations ON dbo.RelationTypes.id = dbo.BusinessRelations.relationTypeID RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.Businesses ON dbo.BusinessRelations.businessID = dbo.Businesses.id

View_Calibration.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.View_Calibration
AS
SELECT        t.id AS calID, t.sensorID, t.calibration, t.userID, t.calDate, t.calExpiration, t.dateEntered
FROM            (SELECT        sensorID, MAX(dateEntered) AS maxDate
                          FROM            dbo.Calibration
                          GROUP BY sensorID) AS r INNER JOIN
                         dbo.Calibration AS t ON t.sensorID = r.sensorID AND t.dateEntered = r.maxDate

View_EmailAddresses.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_EmailAddresses]
AS
SELECT        dbo.EmailAddresses.id AS emailID, dbo.EmailAddresses.address AS emailAddress, dbo.EmailAddresses.userID, dbo.Users.firstName AS userFirstName, dbo.Users.lastName AS userLastName, 
                         dbo.Users.archived AS userArchived
FROM            dbo.EmailAddresses INNER JOIN
                         dbo.Users ON dbo.EmailAddresses.userID = dbo.Users.id

View_LabeledTestRequests.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_LabeledTestRequests]
AS
SELECT        dbo.View_TestRequests.testRequestID, dbo.View_TestRequests.testRequestDateCreated, dbo.View_TestRequests.testRequestNumber, dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecID, dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecDateCreated, 
                         dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecName, dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecTypeId, dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecType, dbo.View_TestRequests.partID, dbo.View_TestRequests.partName, dbo.View_TestRequests.partTypeID, 
                         dbo.View_TestRequests.partTypeName, dbo.View_TestRequests.manufacturerID, dbo.View_TestRequests.manufacturerName, dbo.View_TestRequests.clientID, dbo.View_TestRequests.clientName, 
                         dbo.View_TestRequests.userIdCreated, dbo.View_TestRequests.userFullName, dbo.View_TestRequests.parts, dbo.View_TestRequests.archived, dbo.View_TestRequestLabelsCSV.labels, 
                         dbo.View_TestRequestLabelIDsCSV.labelIDs
FROM            dbo.View_TestRequests LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_TestRequestLabelIDsCSV ON dbo.View_TestRequests.testRequestID = dbo.View_TestRequestLabelIDsCSV.testRequestID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_TestRequestLabelsCSV ON dbo.View_TestRequests.testRequestID = dbo.View_TestRequestLabelsCSV.testRequestID

View_LabeledTestRequestsAndLabelIDs.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_LabeledTestRequestsAndLabelIDs]
AS
SELECT        dbo.View_LabeledTestRequests.*, dbo.ItemLabels.labelTypeID, dbo.ItemLabels.labelID
FROM            dbo.View_LabeledTestRequests LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.ItemLabels ON dbo.View_LabeledTestRequests.testRequestID = dbo.ItemLabels.itemID

View_MachineSensors.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_MachineSensors]
AS
SELECT        M.machineID, M.tag, S.sensorID, S.sensor, S.calibration, S.calID
FROM            dbo.View_Sensors AS S INNER JOIN
                         dbo.View_SensorsMap AS M ON S.sensorID = M.sensorID

View_Parts.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_Parts]
AS
SELECT        dbo.Parts.id AS partID, dbo.Parts.name AS partName, dbo.Parts.partTypeID, dbo.PartTypes.name AS partTypeName, dbo.Parts.manufacturerID, dbo.Businesses.name AS manufacturerName, dbo.Parts.dateCreated
FROM            dbo.Businesses RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.Parts ON dbo.Businesses.id = dbo.Parts.manufacturerID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.PartTypes ON dbo.Parts.partTypeID = dbo.PartTypes.id

View_PhoneNumbers.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_PhoneNumbers]
AS
SELECT        dbo.MobileNetworks.name AS networkName, dbo.MobileNetworks.address AS networkAddress, dbo.PhoneNumbers.id AS phoneID, dbo.PhoneNumbers.number AS phoneNumber, dbo.Users.id AS userID, 
                         dbo.Users.firstName AS userFirstName, dbo.Users.lastName AS userLastName, dbo.Users.archived AS userArchived, dbo.MobileNetworks.id AS networkID
FROM            dbo.MobileNetworks INNER JOIN
                         dbo.PhoneNumbers ON dbo.MobileNetworks.id = dbo.PhoneNumbers.networkID INNER JOIN
                         dbo.Users ON dbo.PhoneNumbers.userID = dbo.Users.id

View_Sensors.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.View_Sensors
AS
SELECT        S.id AS sensorID, S.serialNumber, S.sensor, C.calID, C.calibration, C.userID AS calUserID, C.calDate, C.calExpiration
FROM            dbo.View_Calibration AS C INNER JOIN
                         dbo.Sensors AS S ON C.sensorID = S.id

View_SensorsMap.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_SensorsMap]
AS
SELECT        S.mapID, S.sensorID, S.machineID, S.tag, S.mapDate, dbo.TestMachines.name AS machineName, dbo.TestMachines.serialNumber AS machineSN, dbo.TestMachineTypes.name AS machineType
FROM            dbo.TestMachineTypes INNER JOIN
                         dbo.TestMachines ON dbo.TestMachineTypes.id = dbo.TestMachines.testMachineTypeID RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        machineID, tag, MAX(mapDate) AS latestMapDate
                               FROM            dbo.SensorsMap
                               GROUP BY machineID, tag) AS M INNER JOIN
                             (SELECT        t.id AS mapID, t.sensorID, t.machineID, t.tag, t.mapDate
                               FROM            (SELECT        sensorID, MAX(mapDate) AS maxDate
                                                         FROM            dbo.SensorsMap AS SensorsMap_1
                                                         GROUP BY sensorID) AS r INNER JOIN
                                                         dbo.SensorsMap AS t ON t.sensorID = r.sensorID AND t.mapDate = r.maxDate) AS S ON M.latestMapDate = S.mapDate AND M.tag = S.tag AND M.machineID = S.machineID ON dbo.TestMachines.id = S.machineID

View_TestMachines.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_TestMachines]
AS
SELECT        dbo.TestMachines.id AS testMachineID, dbo.TestMachines.name AS testMachineName, dbo.TestMachines.serialNumber AS testMachineSN, dbo.TestMachines.testMachineTypeID, 
                         dbo.TestMachineTypes.name AS testMachineType
FROM            dbo.TestMachines LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.TestMachineTypes ON dbo.TestMachines.testMachineTypeID = dbo.TestMachineTypes.id

View_TestRequestLabelIDsCSV.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_TestRequestLabelIDsCSV]
AS
WITH Partitioned AS
(
    SELECT 
        itemID,
        labelID,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY itemID ORDER BY labelID) AS NameNumber,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY itemID) AS NameCount
    FROM View_TestRequestlabels
),
Concatenated AS
(
    SELECT 
        itemID, 
        CAST(labelID AS nvarchar) AS labelIDs, 
        labelID, 
        NameNumber, 
        NameCount 
    FROM Partitioned 
    WHERE NameNumber = 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        P.itemID, 
        CAST(C.labelIDs + ',' + CAST(P.labelID AS nvarchar) AS nvarchar), 
        P.labelID, 
        P.NameNumber, 
        P.NameCount
    FROM Partitioned AS P
        INNER JOIN Concatenated AS C 
                ON P.itemID = C.itemID 
                AND P.NameNumber = C.NameNumber + 1
)
SELECT 
    itemID AS testRequestID,
    labelIDs
FROM Concatenated
WHERE NameNumber = NameCount

View_TestRequestLabels.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_TestRequestLabels]
AS
SELECT        dbo.ItemLabels.itemID, dbo.TestRequests.testRequestNumber, dbo.Labels.name AS labelName, dbo.ItemLabels.labelID
FROM            dbo.ItemLabels INNER JOIN
                         dbo.Labels ON dbo.ItemLabels.labelID = dbo.Labels.id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.TestRequests ON dbo.ItemLabels.id = dbo.TestRequests.id
WHERE        (dbo.ItemLabels.labelTypeID = 1)

View_TestRequestLabelsCSV.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_TestRequestLabelsCSV]
AS
WITH Partitioned AS
(
    SELECT 
        itemID,
        labelName,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY itemID ORDER BY labelName) AS NameNumber,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY itemID) AS NameCount
    FROM View_TestRequestlabels
),
Concatenated AS
(
    SELECT 
        itemID, 
        CAST(labelName AS nvarchar) AS labels, 
        labelName, 
        NameNumber, 
        NameCount 
    FROM Partitioned 
    WHERE NameNumber = 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        P.itemID, 
        CAST(C.labels + ', ' + P.labelName AS nvarchar), 
        P.labelName, 
        P.NameNumber, 
        P.NameCount
    FROM Partitioned AS P
        INNER JOIN Concatenated AS C 
                ON P.itemID = C.itemID 
                AND P.NameNumber = C.NameNumber + 1
)
SELECT 
    itemID AS testRequestID,
    labels
FROM Concatenated
WHERE NameNumber = NameCount

View_TestRequests.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.View_TestRequests
AS
SELECT        dbo.TestRequests.id AS testRequestID, dbo.TestRequests.dateCreated AS testRequestDateCreated, dbo.TestRequests.testRequestNumber, dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecID, dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecDateCreated, 
                         dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecName, dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecTypeId, dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecType, dbo.TestRequests.partID, dbo.View_Parts.partName, dbo.View_Parts.partTypeID, dbo.View_Parts.partTypeName, 
                         dbo.View_Parts.manufacturerID, dbo.View_Parts.manufacturerName, dbo.TestRequests.clientID, dbo.Businesses.name AS clientName, dbo.TestRequests.userIdCreated, dbo.View_Users.fullName AS userFullName, 
                         dbo.TestRequests.parts, dbo.TestRequests.archived
FROM            dbo.TestRequests LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_Parts ON dbo.TestRequests.partID = dbo.View_Parts.partID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_Users ON dbo.TestRequests.userIdCreated = dbo.View_Users.userID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.Businesses ON dbo.TestRequests.clientID = dbo.Businesses.id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_TestSpecs ON dbo.TestRequests.testSpecID = dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecID

View_Tests.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.View_Tests
AS
SELECT        dbo.Tests.id AS testID, dbo.Tests.date AS testDate, dbo.Tests.dataPath, dbo.Tests.partSerialNumber, dbo.Tests.completed, dbo.Tests.testRequestID, dbo.View_TestRequests.testRequestNumber, 
                         dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecID, dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecName, dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecTypeId, dbo.View_TestRequests.testSpecType, dbo.Tests.testMachineID, 
                         dbo.View_TestMachines.testMachineName, dbo.View_TestMachines.testMachineSN, dbo.View_TestMachines.testMachineTypeID, dbo.View_TestMachines.testMachineType, dbo.View_TestRequests.partID, 
                         dbo.View_TestRequests.partName, dbo.View_TestRequests.partTypeID, dbo.View_TestRequests.partTypeName, dbo.View_TestRequests.manufacturerID, dbo.View_TestRequests.manufacturerName, 
                         dbo.View_TestRequests.clientID, dbo.View_TestRequests.clientName, dbo.Tests.userID, dbo.View_Users.fullName AS userFullName, dbo.Tests.vexaID, dbo.Tests.archived
FROM            dbo.Tests LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_Users ON dbo.Tests.userID = dbo.View_Users.userID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_TestRequests ON dbo.Tests.testRequestID = dbo.View_TestRequests.testRequestID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_TestMachines ON dbo.Tests.testMachineID = dbo.View_TestMachines.testMachineID

View_TestSpecs.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.View_TestSpecs
AS
SELECT        dbo.TestSpecs.id AS testSpecID, dbo.TestSpecs.dateCreated AS testSpecDateCreated, dbo.TestSpecs.name AS testSpecName, dbo.TestSpecs.testSpecTypeId, dbo.TestSpecTypes.name AS testSpecType, 
                         dbo.TestSpecs.userIdCreated, dbo.View_Users.fullName AS userFullName, dbo.TestSpecs.archived
FROM            dbo.TestSpecTypes RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.TestSpecs ON dbo.TestSpecTypes.id = dbo.TestSpecs.testSpecTypeId LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_Users ON dbo.TestSpecs.userIdCreated = dbo.View_Users.userID

View_TestSpecsAdmin.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[View_TestSpecsAdmin]
AS
SELECT        dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecID, dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecTypeId, dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecName, dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecDateCreated AS dateCreated, dbo.View_TestSpecs.userIdCreated AS createdByUserID, 
                         dbo.View_TestSpecs.userFullName AS createdByName, dbo.TestSpecs.dateModified, dbo.TestSpecs.userIdModified AS modifiedByUserID, dbo.View_Users.fullName AS modifiedByName, dbo.View_TestSpecs.archived
FROM            dbo.TestSpecs INNER JOIN
                         dbo.View_TestSpecs ON dbo.TestSpecs.id = dbo.View_TestSpecs.testSpecID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_Users ON dbo.TestSpecs.userIdModified = dbo.View_Users.userID

View_Users.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.View_Users
AS
SELECT        id AS userID, dateCreated, firstName, lastName, username, firstName + N' ' + lastName AS fullName, accessLevel, archived
FROM            dbo.Users

View_WeightTests.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.View_WeightTests
AS
SELECT        dbo.View_Tests.testID, dbo.View_Tests.testDate, dbo.View_Tests.dataPath, dbo.View_Tests.partSerialNumber, dbo.View_Tests.completed, dbo.View_Tests.testRequestID, dbo.View_Tests.testRequestNumber, 
                         dbo.View_Tests.testSpecID, dbo.View_Tests.testSpecName, dbo.View_Tests.testSpecTypeId, dbo.View_Tests.testSpecType, dbo.View_Tests.testMachineID, dbo.View_Tests.testMachineName, dbo.View_Tests.testMachineSN, 
                         dbo.View_Tests.testMachineTypeID, dbo.View_Tests.testMachineType, dbo.View_Tests.partID, dbo.View_Tests.partName, dbo.View_Tests.partTypeID, dbo.View_Tests.partTypeName, dbo.View_Tests.manufacturerID, 
                         dbo.View_Tests.manufacturerName, dbo.View_Tests.clientID, dbo.View_Tests.clientName, dbo.View_Tests.userID, dbo.View_Tests.userFullName, dbo.View_Tests.vexaID, dbo.WeightTests.weight, dbo.WeightTests.temperature, 
                         dbo.WeightTests.humidity, dbo.WeightTests.pressure, dbo.WeightTests.notes, dbo.WeightTests.precision
FROM            dbo.WeightTests RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.View_Tests ON dbo.WeightTests.testID = dbo.View_Tests.testID
